headline: Forget Oil Prices — This 1 Refining Number Explains Why These Energy Stocks Are On Fire
summary: Refinery stocks like Marathon Petroleum and Valero have delivered gains that crush the S&P 500 this year, and crude oil prices have almost nothing to do with it. One obscure industry metric explains everything, and most investors have never heard of it.

headline: How Current Refining Margins Are Driving an Edge for MPC

headline: Trump Hails Military as 'Oil Is Flowing Like Never Before'—Data Shows 10% of Global Refining Capacity Is Offline
summary: Trump claims oil is 'flowing' amid an Iran blockade, but Kobeissi data reveals 10% of global refining capacity is offline.

headline: How Cheap Is ExxonMobil Stock Once You Look Two Years Out?
summary: The company's high price tag today hides a significant discount on future earnings, but that discount only exists if an aggressive growth story actually unfolds.
